events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: confined space work in progress, permit expired mid-shift. Under OSHA 1910.146, a permit-required confined space entry permit is valid only for the duration of the entry. If the permit expires, work must stop, the space must be evacuated, and a new permit must be issued before re-entry.

This is a sequence violation - work continuing with an expired permit is non-compliant. Decision should be fail. Risk is high/critical. Work must stop, evacuate, re-evaluate, re-issue permit before continuing.
